name: Reducto
description: Research- and media-focused AI assistant for parsing documents, transcripts, and supporting research workflows.

auth_methods.note: Site CTAs are for requesting early access / demos; no public API or documented authentication methods are exposed on the public site.

credential_access.note: Contact page routes inquiries to demos/enterprise and a contact form, indicating access (including any programmatic access) is handled via contact-sales/early access rather than a self-serve developer signup.

api_surface.note: No public REST/GraphQL/docs root found on the official site; product pages are marketing only and do not link to developer documentation.

buildability.note: There are no public developer docs or a self-serve API key/signup; access appears to require contacting the vendor for demos/enterprise.

queries: reducto.ai pricing OR plans OR signup OR "request access"
